title: Os' Better Eating Sounds
description: This pack changes the painful eating sound to something more pleasant. Check the video for a sample of the new sound!
body:
[![FastClient Ad](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f1dc21fae33dabdbc4a6109168110e69b42bf6f7.png)](https://fastclient.net/Oslypsis)

# What Does This Pack Do?

This pack changes the awful eating sounds of Minecraft to be more pleasant.

Audio sample:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/sYBh8p53Q3g" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

[![Join our public server](https://i.ibb.co/6JJPnwb/ezgif-com-gif-maker-2.gif)](https://osland.store.playerlands.com/)

[![Get 25% off your first month with BisectHosting using promo code oslypsis](https://www.bisecthosting.com/partners/custom-banners/a68298ac-ecfb-4f1b-9057-5081d638948d.webp)](https://bisecthosting.com/oslypsis)

# Usage Rights
Using/modifying for personal use is allowed.

Use (even if modified) for monetized videos must include a link in the description back to this page.

Please ask before using my content in your mods/packs/etc. Do not redistribute.

Using this pack as a template to make your own textures that work the same way in game as mine do is allowed and encouraged. Please note that I've changed some of the names of the files from their vanilla counterparts - you will need to keep these names when changing out the textures or the files will not be able to find the textures.
